steps.t: Gauradan-pouches can be found at their camp in the Even-rills, north-east of the Eavespires. Remmenylf asked you to bring him several of the pouches t…
Remmenylf can be found at the Eavespires, south-west of the Even-rills. Remmenylf will want to examine the Gauradan shaman pouches you recovered.
